item.title: Home Screening Appeals to Women Facing Healthcare Barriers
item.description: Researchers asked more than 2000 women if they preferred at-home vaginal self-sampling over clinic-based testing to screen for cervical cancer. Medsca...

item.title: Why Obesity Research Is Far From Over
item.description: Clinicians warn that GLP-1 treatment often ends within a year and can lead to rapid weight regain; experts urge personalized nutrition, behavioral car...

item.title: AAP Finds No New Evidence Against Hep B Vaccine Birth Dose
item.description: AAP publishes review of safety and efficacy of hepatitis B vaccination birth dose. Medscape Medical News

item.title: Which Salvage Therapy Is Best for Recurrent Prostate Cancer?
item.description: Ten-year survival data support salvage focal therapy as an option for patients with localized recurrence after prostate cancer radiotherapy. Medscape ...

item.title: Communication Lapses Factor More in Cardiology Malpractice
item.description: ‘Soft’ factors, including communication among providers and with patients, are gaining traction as drivers behind malpractice claims in cardiology. Me...
